/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,opslib.so -o opslib.so CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/ADD/add_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/CPY/cpy_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/GELU/gelu_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/MUL/mul_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/MUL_MAT/mul_mat_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/NORM/norm_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/PERMUTE/permute_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/RESHAPE/reshape_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/RMS_NORM/rms_norm_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/ROPE/rope_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/SVD_MUL_MAT/svd_mul_mat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/VIEW/view1d_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/VIEW/view2d_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/VIEW/view3d_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/VIEW/view4d_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/ops_py.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tianruiming/miniconda3/lib:/home/tianruiming/CE_ADA_LLAMA/build/bin /home/tianruiming/miniconda3/lib/libpython3.12.so ../bin/libggml.so ../bin/libggml-cpu.so ../bin/libggml-base.so
